name: V Golf Indoor Golf Simulator Suites
about: V Golf Indoor Golf Simulator Suites offers a premium indoor golf experience with four private simulator suites powered by Trackman Golf technology. Located at Triggs Memorial Golf Course, it features 16' x 9' HD projection screens and allows players to choose from courses worldwide or practice in the Trackman Performance Studio. The venue operates seasonally from November to March with flexible hours and accommodates 1-4 players per bay. Pricing starts at $40 per hour, with all sessions requiring advance booking online or by email.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Private suites ensure an exclusive and uninterrupted golf experience
Flexible pricing and operating hours accommodate various schedules
Course selection from around the world and practice range options

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy encouraged, with no restrictions mentioned
BYOB policy encouraged, with no restrictions mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own golf clubs. All clubs must be clean to enter the simulator suite.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are encouraged to bring your own golf balls and food/drinks. BYOB is allowed with no restrictions mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but sessions are booked by the hour with a starting price of $40 per hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention child-friendly features, but Trackman technology is suitable for all ages and skill levels.
